sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43753" key="eu)ekxo/lwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐεκ-χόλωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily made bilious</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philagr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
